start.title: 👋 Welcome to Gigs Archive Bot!
steps: Send a photo with event description
Choose: show your name or anonymous
start.footer:
All submissions are moderated before being published in the channel.

Use /help for the list of commands.
start.auto_subscribe_note: ✅ You are automatically subscribed to the weekly Friday summary! To unsubscribe: /sub_off

help.title: 📚 Available Commands
help.general_commands:
/start — Start the bot
/help — Show this help
/language — 🌐 Change language
help.posters_commands:
/poster — Submit a new poster
/stats — Your publication statistics
/cancel — Cancel current action
help.subscription_commands:
/summary — Weekly event summary
/sub_on — Subscribe to Friday digest
/sub_off — Unsubscribe from digest

confirmation.title: ✅ Review Before Publishing
confirmation.preview_hint: 👁️ Review the poster before sending for moderation:

start.title: 📸 Send Your Poster
start.description: Attach a photo and add a link and description of the event in the caption. Important: Be sure to include at least one link to the event!
start.edit_hint: ✏️ You'll be able to edit everything before publication!

forwarded.no_content:
⚠️ The forwarded message must contain text or media.
Please send a photo with description or forward a message with a poster.

invalid_photo.text: ⚠️ Please send a photo for your poster. You can add the event description in the caption.

validation_error.no_link: ⚠️ Please add at least one link to the event.
validation_error.retry_hint: Click the button below to try again.

anonymous.title: 🔐 Privacy Settings
anonymous.description: Will your name be shown with this poster?

date.title: 📅 When is the event?
date.description: Select a date from the options below:

edit.title: ✏️ Edit Poster
edit.description:
Send a new photo to replace the current one.
Description and other settings will be saved.

success.title: ✅ Poster Submitted!
success.description:
Your poster is now in the moderation queue.
You will be notified when it's reviewed.

cancelled.with_photo: ❌ Submission cancelled. 👋 Welcome to Gigs Archive! I help publish event posters after moderation. 📸 How to submit a poster: 1. Use the /poster command 2. Send a photo with event description 3. Choose: show your name or anonymous 4. Specify the event date 5. Confirm and submit! All submissions are moderated before being published in the channel. Use /help for the list of commands.

retry.title: 📸 Send Your Poster
retry.description: Attach a photo and add the event description. Don't forget to add at least one link!

approved.anon_no: It was published with your name.

decline_reasons.low_quality: 📷 Low quality image — please use a clearer, higher resolution photo.
decline_reasons.missing_details: 📝 Missing event details — please add date, time and venue.
decline_reasons.inappropriate: 🚫 Inappropriate content — please ensure the content follows community guidelines.
decline_reasons.wrong_date: 📅 Wrong date or event already passed — please submit posters for upcoming events.
decline_reasons.duplicate: 🔄 Duplicate submission — this event was already submitted before.

action.published_success: ✅ Published successfully! Poster #{poster_id} is now in the channel.
action.returned_to_queue: ⬅️ Poster #{poster_id} returned to queue 👤 @{username} cancelled finalization Moderation buttons restored above ↑

edit_again.title: ✏️ Edit Final Description
edit_again.description: Send the final text for this publication.

moderation.no_posters_pending:
ℹ️ No posters awaiting finalization.
First approve a poster in the moderation chat!

pending.title: ⏳ Posters Pending Moderation:
pending.how_to_find_step2: Search for the poster ID (or use @MessageInfoBot)

moderation_finalize.title: ✏️ Create Final Description
moderation_finalize.description:
Send the final description for this publication.
Include in the description:
 • Event details
 • Date/time
 • Venue
 • Ticket links
 • Hashtags
moderation_finalize.footer: Or click «Skip» to use the original description.

sub_on.title: ✅ You are subscribed to the weekly summary!
sub_on.description: 📅 Every Friday at 14:30 I'll send you a selection of weekend events.

sub_off.title: ❌ You have unsubscribed from the weekly summary.

friday_message.title: 🎉 Friday! Time to plan your weekend
friday_message.no_events: We haven't found anything for this weekend yet( But we're still looking!
friday_message.found_events: Found {count} events for the coming days:
friday_message.footer: This is an automatic selection from Gigs Archive To unsubscribe: /sub_off
friday_message.hint: Want to be the first to know about new events? Submit posters via /poster

common.error: ⚠️ An error occurred. Please try again.
common.not_authorized: ❌ You are not authorized for this action.
common.language_hint: ℹ️ Use command /language to change it.

weekly_summary.title: 📊 Weekly Event Summary
weekly_summary.no_events: 📭 No events were approved this week.
weekly_summary.footer: Summary created by Gigs Archive bot
